text.text: 🚨 *Anomaly — 0 sessions for 3+ consecutive days, GA4 tracking appears broken (ticket created)*

*Top Pages* (vs last week)
No data — consistent with 0 sessions yesterday

*Referral Sources* (vs last week)
No data — consistent with 0 sessions yesterday

*Signals*
• *What:* Sessions 431 → 0 (↓100% WoW). Both 2026-06-21 and 2026-06-22 show zero sessions, users, and page views. Top Pages and Referral Sources tabs empty. Same weekday last week (2026-06-15) had 431 sessions.
  *So what:* Formoria has had no tracked traffic for at least 3 consecutive days. Either the GA4 tag was accidentally removed in a recent deploy, the GA4 data stream is broken, or the site is down — all acquisition data is dark.
  *Now what:* (1) Confirm formoria.com loads in a browser. (2) Open DevTools → Network → look for `collect?v=2` GA4 hit on page load. (3) Check GA4 property 538232091 → Admin → Data Streams for stream health. (4) Review recent deploys for GA4 tag removal.

*Ticket Created*
• <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-879/growth-pulse-2026-06-23-zero-traffic-day-3-complete-ga4-blackout|DEV-879: [Growth Pulse] 2026-06-23 — Zero-traffic day 3: complete GA4 blackout continues>

elements.text: Compared against same weekday last week (2026-06-15). GA4 data may lag 24–48h. Last sheet update: 2026-06-23 07:34 UTC+8.
